problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
